---
title: "cortex.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\fixtures\.agents\scripts\engine\cortex.py"
loc: 46
complexity: 10
logic_score: 1.90
style_score: 3.83
intel_score: 4.88
overall_score: 2.67
---

## Intent
The `cortex.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on Cortex, __init__, _ingest, query. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via Cortex, __init__, _ingest, query. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 1.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [re](file://re)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `Cortex`
- `__init__`
- `_ingest`
- `query`
